canonical.description: Canonical variant: acquire at entry, release at exit, full skill body.

phase-4-only.description: Phase-4-only variant: acquire/release wraps only the architect critic loop in Phase 4.

per-round.description: Per-round variant: acquire/release wraps each plan/critic/revise round.

per-phase.description: Per-phase variant: acquire/release wraps each phase subagent dispatch.

stub.description: Stub variant (S-2): only §0c block present; no §0 dispatch, no skill body. Full skill body lands in architecture S-3.
